signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Confirmed Dropped, Fueling XRP Surge and ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Confirmed Dropped, Fueling XRP Surge and ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's 10% April 2026 rally above $1.50 (now ~$1.42), with analysts predicting up to $2.71-$5 by year-end.[1][5]
